name: messages_send
description: Send a message via SMS, MMS, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, or Viber using the Vonage Messages API v1. Specify the channel, message type, recipient, sender, and message content. Returns a message UUID for tracking delivery status via webhooks.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g., '14155550123') or channel-specific identifier.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The sender phone number in E.164 format or an alphanumeric sender ID (max 11 characters).

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The messaging channel to use: 'sms', 'mms', 'whatsapp', 'messenger', or 'viber_service'.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text body of the message. Required when message_type is 'text'.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: Image object with 'url' and optional 'caption'. Required when message_type is 'image'.

parameters.name: client_ref
parameters.description: A client-defined reference string for tracking purposes. Maximum 100 characters.

parameters.name: webhook_url
parameters.description: Override the default status webhook URL for this message.

body.text: Your verification code is 482910. It expires in 10 minutes.
